svg.text: McCzarny recently made several updates across
his repositories. In chromium-daily-digest, he
increased the Nexos service timeout to 15
minutes and updated the summary generation and
index page to display only the last 30 days of
summaries. For skia-preview, he added new
aliases like QUADRATIC_TO for quadratic Bezier
curve commands, enhancing compatibility. He
also simplified the skia-preview web app by
removing an example section and refining the
README to direct users to the GitHub
repository. Further improvements to
skia-preview include adding support for colored
icons and a favicon, which involved refactoring
`skia-parser.js` to handle multiple colored
paths and updating the styling. He also updated
the skia-preview README to clearly state the
project's Work-In-Progress status and encourage
contributions, requesting icon files when
reporting issues. On the OutlookUnreadCounter
repository, an issue was reported regarding the
inability to select an Outlook account. The
user described facing an empty account dropdown
despite using the classic Outlook desktop
application and an updated Stream Deck.
Generated on: Sun Mar 15 09:18:32 2026
